6. After boiling, serve with grated cheese on top and a cooked hen in the middle
source_title: Cozinheiro moderno, ou nova arte de cozinha

title: Sopa à Italiana (Italian Soup)
body:
## Ingredients

- two arratels of mutton
- half arratel of bacon
- one and a half canada of water
- half quartilho of wine
- one splash of vinegar
- herbs and onions
- cloves
- cinnamon stick
- quarter of butter
- pepper
- two handfuls of flour and butter in small pieces
- six egg yolks
- lemon
- cinnamon

## Directions

1. Cook two arratels of mutton and half arratel of bacon in a pot with one and a half canada of water, half quartilho of wine, one splash of vinegar, herbs and onions
2. Stud the onions with cloves and a whole cinnamon stick
3. When cooked, season with all the seasonings and let it boil
4. Remove the bacon and mutton so that the broth remains clear
5. Reduce to three quartilhos
6. Add a quarter of butter and pepper
7. Let the broth boil, and when it is boiling, add two handfuls of flour and butter in small pieces
8. Boil until it thickens, stirring constantly
9. Add six beaten egg yolks with lemon juice and cinnamon
10. When well thickened, pour into a plate
11. Place the mutton on top, which should remain hot
12. Garnish with lemon slices and cover with cinnamon
13. Serve at table
source_title: Arte de cozinha

title: Sopa à Portuguesa (Portuguese Soup)
author: Lucas Rigaud
body:
## Ingredients

- parsley, cilantro, and mint bundle
- bread
- quarter of potatoes
- beef broth made from beef, bacon, ham, partridge, handful of grains, two cabbage sprouts, two turnips, head of garlic, and onion studded with cloves
- poached eggs

## Directions

1. Place in the bottom of a pot a bundle made of parsley, cilantro, and mint
2. Cut a loaf of bread in half and cut into pieces
3. Arrange in the pot with crusts facing down and a quarter of potatoes
4. Cover with broth made from beef, bacon, ham, a partridge, a handful of grains, two cabbage sprouts, two turnips, head of garlic, and an onion studded with cloves
5. Bring to boil for a moment over some coals with the pot covered
6. When cooked, serve from top to bottom onto a deep plate or in a soup tureen
7. Serve garnished around with the bacon and ham and in the middle the cabbage sprouts with six poached eggs
source_title: Cozinheiro moderno, ou nova arte de cozinha

title: Sopas de Aletria e outras Massas (Vermicelli Soup and Other Pasta)
author: Lucas Rigaud
body:
## Ingredients

- good broth
- fish substance
- half pound of vermicelli or Italian pasta shapes

## Directions

1. Pass through a sieve and into a pot two spoonfuls of good broth
2. Add one spoonful of substance and bring to boil
3. When boiling, add half a pound of vermicelli or any of the Italian pasta shapes that come in the shape of hearts, melon seeds, etc.
4. Let simmer by the fire for about an hour
5. When cooked, remove the fat
6. Serve neither very thick nor very thin; if it comes out too thick, add the broth and substance needed to make it more liquid
source_title: Cozinheiro moderno, ou nova arte de cozinha

title: Sopas de Arroz à Francesa (French Rice Soup)
author: Lucas Rigaud
body:
## Ingredients

- half pound of rice
- broth
- ham
- onion
- cloves
- veal substance

## Directions

1. Wash the rice three or four times in warm water and drain it in a sieve
2. Put it to cook in a small pot with a little broth, a piece of ham, an onion with two cloves
3. Let it simmer gently for an hour and a half or two hours
4. After cooking, finish moistening it with good broth and two spoonfuls of veal substance
5. Remove the ham, onion, and fat
6. When it has good flavor, serve it neither very thick nor very thin
source_title: Cozinheiro moderno, ou nova arte de cozinha

title: Sopas de Cebolas Inteiras (Whole Onion Soup)
author: Lucas Rigaud
body:
## Ingredients

- Two or three dozen small round onions
- Broth
- Substance (broth essence)
- Bread crusts boiled in broth
- A capon or chicken cooked

## Directions

1. Boil two or three dozen small round onions in water
2. When half-cooked, place in cold water
3. Peel and prepare them
4. Place them to cook in broth with one spoon of substance
5. Let them simmer little by little
6. When cooked, serve over bread crusts boiled in broth as mentioned, with a capon or cooked chicken in the middle
source_title: Cozinheiro moderno, ou nova arte de cozinha

title: Sopas de Crostas ao Gratém (Cheese Crusted Bread Soup)
author: Lucas Rigaud
body:
## Ingredients

- bread
- broth strained
- fat
- heat source

## Directions

1. Cut a bread in half as it comes from the oven
2. Remove all the crumb
3. Place the crusts in a casserole with one spoon of broth strained through a sieve with all the fat
4. Let it boil an instant
5. Transfer to a hollow plate and place over a small stove to boil
6. When attached and gratineed, drain the fat from it
7. Serve with the broths, substances, and broth that is most convenient and to the taste of those who will eat it
source_title: Cozinheiro moderno, ou nova arte de cozinha

title: Sopas de Crostas à Piemonteza (Piedmontese Bread Soup)
author: Lucas Rigaud
body:
## Ingredients

- bread
- Parmesan cheese, grated
- fat
- beef broth
- veal substance

## Directions

1. Cut a loaf of bread in half and remove the crumb, keeping the crusts
2. Serve the crusts as in the previous recipe; after cooking, transfer them to a baking dish
3. Cover with grated Parmesan cheese
4. Dot with a little fat and place in the oven to brown
5. Cut a piece of bread into thin slices
6. Arrange the slices in a serving plate with grated cheese on a heat source
7. Pour a little broth over them
8. When stuck to the bottom of the plate, place the well-browned crusts in the middle
9. Serve with broth from the potage, lightly salted, and with veal substance
10. They may also be served with different broths and substances such as partridge, chicken, capons, ducks, pigeons, etc., noting that neither the broths nor the substances destined for soups or stews that contain cheese should be salty
source_title: Cozinheiro moderno, ou nova arte de cozinha

title: Sopas de Culí da Rainha (Queen's Broth Soup)
author: Lucas Rigaud
body:
## Ingredients

- One handful of sweet almonds
- Breast of a roasted capon
- Four hard egg yolks
- A piece of bread soaked in milk
- Broth of veal and ham

## Directions

1. Pound in a stone mortar, after shelling, one handful of sweet almonds
2. When pounded, add the breast of a roasted capon, chopped, four hard egg yolks, a piece of bread soaked in milk, and continue pounding everything very well
3. When pounded, pass to a casserole, dissolve with broth of veal and ham
4. Place to heat, and without boiling, pass through fine cloth, heat again, and when hot pour over bread crusts boiled in broth, with their chickens in the middle
5. This broth serves for all types of white soups, and also for various entries, noting that when for soups, it should be more liquid and less strong
source_title: Cozinheiro moderno, ou nova arte de cozinha

title: Sopas de Culí de Ervilhas (Pea Broth Soup)
author: Lucas Rigaud
body:
## Ingredients

- One or two eighths measure of green peas
- Tails of small onions
- Some sprigs of parsley
- Broth
- Melted bacon
- Substance made of slices of veal, a piece of ham, and two roots

## Directions

1. Pick one or two eighths measure of green peas, tails of small onions, some sprigs of parsley and clean them all in hot water
2. Sauté them afterwards in melted bacon
3. Add a little broth and let them cook
4. When cooked and mashed, dissolve them in a casserole with two spoonfuls of substance made of slices of veal, a piece of ham, and two roots
5. Then pass through a fine sieve
6. When of good taste and hot, serve over bread crusts boiled as mentioned, with small young chickens or ducks in the middle
source_title: Cozinheiro moderno, ou nova arte de cozinha

title: Sopas de Côdeas de Pão com Queijo Parmezão (Bread Crust Soup with Parmesan Cheese)
author: Lucas Rigaud
body:
## Ingredients

- Two twenty-reis loaves of bread
- Broth and substance
- Five or two breasts of partridges, chopped
- Parmesan cheese
- Alternatively: breasts of capons, hens, peacocks, partridges, or any other birds

## Directions

1. After toasting two twenty-reis loaves of bread, cut them in two parts
2. Remove all the crumb, dry them at the fire
3. Moisten them with broth and substance, and place them to boil for an instant
4. When almost dried, place on top five or two chopped partridge breasts covered with Parmesan cheese
5. Place in the oven to brown, or brown with a hot spatula
6. After browning, serve with two or three spoonfuls of flavorful, good-colored broth
7. In place of chopped partridge, one can use breasts of capons, hens, peacocks, partridges, or any other birds one wishes
source_title: Cozinheiro moderno, ou nova arte de cozinha

title: Sopas de Hervas para Dias de Jejum (Herb Soup for Fasting Days)
author: Lucas Rigaud
body:
## Ingredients

- butter
- cucumbers
- garlic
- lettuce
- sorrel
- chervil
- green onions
- broth made from roots
- bread
- egg yolks
- lemon juice

## Directions

1. Sauté in butter sliced cucumbers, garlic, lettuce, sorrel, chervil, and green onions, all cut into pieces
2. Pour in broth made from roots and let simmer gently
3. When cooked, cut bread into thin slices, dry in the oven
4. Serve the bread slices in two spoonfuls of the herb broth and one spoonful of root substance
5. Serve with egg yolks dissolved in the remaining broth and lemon juice
source_title: Cozinheiro moderno, ou nova arte de cozinha

title: Sopas de Hervas à Francesa (French Herb Soups for Fish Days)
author: Lucas Rigaud
body:
## Ingredients

- Five or six artichoke hearts, cut into pieces
- Half a dozen small green onions
- Half an eighth of peas
- Some asparagus tips
- Butter
- One spoonful of vegetable broth
- One spoonful of vegetable substance
- Slices of bread fried in butter
- A few leaves
- One bunch of chopped and pressed chervil

## Directions

1. Cut the artichoke hearts into pieces and chop the small green onions
2. Sauté everything in butter
3. After sautéing, add one spoonful of vegetable broth and another of vegetable substance
4. Let it simmer little by little
5. Soak slices of bread fried in butter with a few leaves and one bunch of chopped and pressed chervil in the mentioned broth and substance
6. After the bread is cooked and dried, place the herbs and peas on top
7. Remove the fat
8. If it tastes good, serve hot
source_title: Cozinheiro moderno, ou nova arte de cozinha

title: Sopas de Hervas à Francesa para Dias de Peixe (French Herb Soup for Fish Days)
author: Lucas Rigaud
body:
## Ingredients

- five or six lettuce sprouts
- half dozen green onions
- half ounce of peas
- some asparagus tips
- butter
- root broth
- root substance

## Directions

1. Cut into pieces five or six lettuce sprouts, half a dozen green onions, half ounce of peas, and some asparagus tips
2. Sauté everything in butter; after sautéing, add one spoonful of root broth and another of the same substance
3. Let simmer gently
source_title: Cozinheiro moderno, ou nova arte de cozinha

title: Sopas de Patos com Repolho (Duck Soup with Cabbage)
author: Lucas Rigaud
body:
## Ingredients

- One duck
- Thick bacon for larding
- Melted bacon
- A piece of ham
- Two arratels of cow meat
- Broth and hot water
- Salt
- One onion studded with cloves
- One head of garlic
- One cabbage

## Directions

1. Clean one duck, lard it with thick bacon, sauté it in a casserole with melted bacon, a piece of ham, and two arratels of cow meat
2. When sautéed, add a little broth and a splash of hot water
3. Season with salt, one clove-studded onion, and one head of garlic
4. Let it simmer little by little
5. When half-cooked, blanch a cabbage in boiling water, squeeze it, tie it with twine, and finish cooking everything together
6. When everything is cooked, pass the broth through a sieve
7. Add some bread crusts and a little substance, and place to boil a little
8. Then remove the fat, garnish with the cabbage and the duck in the middle, and serve
9. One can also make soups of cabbage or Lombard cabbage with partridges, pigeons, ducks, or teals
source_title: Cozinheiro moderno, ou nova arte de cozinha

title: Sopas de Perdizes e Nabos (Partridge Soup with Turnips)
author: Lucas Rigaud
body:
## Ingredients

- Two partridges
- Bacon for larding
- Two sides of cow meat
- A piece of ham
- Two roots (vegetables)
- One onion with two cloves
- Broth
- Some turnips
- Butter
- Flour
- Bread crusts

## Directions

1. Clean two partridges, clean them, lard them with bacon, and sauté with two sides of cow meat, a piece of ham, two roots, and one onion with two cloves
2. After everything is sautéed, add the necessary broth
3. Pass everything to a pot and place to boil
4. Meanwhile, cut some turnips into equal pieces, turn them, pass them through the fire in a casserole with melted butter, dust them with flour, and when they are somewhat browned, add a little broth from the partridges
5. After cooking and without fat, boil some bread crusts in the same broth, garnish with the turnips, place the partridges in the middle, and serve
6. In the same manner, one makes ducks, ducks, teals, and pigeons
source_title: Cozinheiro moderno, ou nova arte de cozinha

title: Sopas de Repolhos à Italiana para Dias de Jejum (Italian Cabbage Soup for Fasting Days)
author: Lucas Rigaud
body:
## Ingredients

- one or two cabbages
- onions
- head of garlic
- parsley and marjoram bundle
- broth
- root substance
- salt
- cloves
- good olive oil

## Directions

1. Cut one or two cabbages into quarters and boil them
2. After cooking, place in cold water, squeeze them, tie with twine
3. Put to simmer in a small pot with whole onions, head of garlic, bundle of parsley and marjoram, a little broth and root substance, seasoned with salt, cloves, and half a spoonful of good olive oil
4. When the cabbages are cooked, moisten the soups with the same broth
5. Serve garnished with the cabbages on top and around
source_title: Cozinheiro moderno, ou nova arte de cozinha

title: Sorvete (Sorbet)
body:
## Ingredients

- seven arrátels of stone sugar
- juice of six lemons
- one cruzado of powdered pearl
- one cruzado of powdered coral
- one cruzado of powdered gold
- six tostões of musk
- twelve tostões of amber
- stone basar as desired

## Directions

1. Place in a pot seven arrátels of stone sugar with the juice of six lemons
2. Beat very well until it reaches good point
3. Add one cruzado of powdered pearl, one cruzado of powdered coral, one cruzado of powdered gold, six tostões of musk, and twelve tostões of amber and stone basar as desired
4. When all this is well beaten pour it into small bowls
source_title: Arte de cozinha

title: Sável Assado (Roasted Shad)
author: Lucas Rigaud
body:
## Ingredients

- One shad, scaled, cleaned, washed, and dried
- Butter or oil
- Onion slices
- Lemon slices
- Salt
- Pepper
- Fine herbs

## Directions

1. Scale, clean, wash, and dry the shad
2. Make an incision along the sides from the head to the tail
3. Marinate it with butter or oil, slices of onion and lemon, salt, pepper, and fine herbs
4. After marinating a short time, place it on the grill on both sides
5. Baste occasionally with the same marinade
6. When roasted and of good color, serve with well-finished azeitão sauce or with crayfish and caper sauce
7. It can also be cut into portions and after being fried, served dry or in an escabeche
source_title: Cozinheiro moderno, ou nova arte de cozinha

title: Sável Cozido ao Corzujon (Shad Cooked Corzejon Style)
author: Lucas Rigaud
body:
## Ingredients

- One shad, scaled, gutted, and without gills
- White or red wine
- A drop of vinegar
- Little salt
- Whole pepper
- All onions
- Some cloves of India
- Marjoram
- A piece of rind of green lemon
- A piece of butter

## Directions

1. Scale, gut, and remove gills from one shad
2. Place it to simmer little by little in a broth made with white or red wine, a drop of vinegar, little salt, whole pepper, all onions, some cloves of India, marjoram, a piece of rind of green lemon, and a piece of butter
3. When cooked, serve it on a napkin garnished with parsley
source_title: Cozinheiro moderno, ou nova arte de cozinha

title: Sêlla de Carneiro de vários modos (Lamb Saddle in Various Ways)
author: Lucas Rigaud
body:
## Ingredients

- Lamb saddle
- Pork belly lard
- Paper
- Butter
- Shallots
- Lemon juice
- Braising liquid
- Breadcrumbs
- Egg yolks
- Vegetables

## Directions

1. The saddle is that part of the lamb that extends from the middle of the thighs to the middle of the ribs, and ordinarily serves as a middle course or to reveal the soups
2. Once cut in the aforesaid manner and aged for a few days to be more tender, trimmed of all its skin, lard it with fine pork belly, cover it with leaves of buttered paper, place it in a roasting pan, and when roasted and of good color, serve it with shallot sauce and lemon juice
3. It can also be cooked as a fricandó, and after being browned with its glaze, serve it with its vegetable ragout or with whatever sauce is preferred
4. The same lamb saddle can be put to cook in braising liquid as beef brisket, and when cooked and well trimmed, brush it with clarified butter and thickened with egg yolk, well covered with breadcrumbs, place it in the oven to brown, and serve it with sauce or chopped parsley or as preferred
source_title: Cozinheiro moderno, ou nova arte de cozinha

title: Talhas de Ovos (Egg Cuts)
body:
## Ingredients

- half dozen eggs
- three egg whites
- half arratel of flour
- one arratel of sifted stone sugar
- one arratel of very finely ground almonds
- salt
- one spoon of flower water
- two spoons of well water

## Directions

1. Place half dozen eggs with three egg whites, half arratel of flour, one arratel of sifted stone sugar, one arratel of very finely ground almonds, salt, one spoon of flower water, and two spoons of well water in a bowl
2. Crumble all this with the hand as one would crumble couscous
3. Once well crumbled, stir with a spoon until bubbles rise
4. Pour into a basin with some flour at the bottom, fill the basin and place inside the oven, baking well between bread
5. Once baked, cut into slices, and if desired, place in the oven to biscuit
source_title: Arte de cozinha

title: Talmujas (Cheese Pastries)
author: Lucas Rigaud
body:
## Ingredients

- Piece of Alenquejo cheese, well fatty
- A little washed butter
- A pinch of pepper
- Handful of fine flour
- Two or three eggs
- A little milk
- Fine dough

## Directions

1. Grind in a stone mortar a piece of fatty Alenquejo cheese, a little washed butter, a pinch of pepper, a handful of fine flour, two or three eggs, and a little milk, but in such a way that it is not too thin
2. Stretch afterwards a dough cake, cut it into square pieces the width of a hand
3. Put a piece of this mixture in the middle, lifting the corners of the dough upwards
4. Brush with beaten eggs
5. Put to cook in the oven
6. When browned, serve for a side dish
source_title: Cozinheiro moderno, ou nova arte de cozinha

title: Tarambolas com Azeitonas (Plovers with Olives)
author: Lucas Rigaud
body:
## Ingredients

- Plovers
- Bacon, scraped
- Onion
- Salt
- Pepper
- Garlic
- Egg yolks
- Lard
- Bacon sheets
- Paper leaves
- Olive ragout

## Directions

1. Pluck the plovers, open them along the sides, remove the entrails and liver
2. Mince everything with scraped bacon, onion, and seasoning with salt, pepper, and half a garlic clove
3. Bind it with two egg yolks
4. Stuff the plovers with this mixture
5. Sew them closed, straighten them, and lard them in pork lard
6. Cover with bacon sheets and paper leaves
7. Roast them
8. When roasted, serve with olive ragout on top
source_title: Cozinheiro moderno, ou nova arte de cozinha

title: Tartaruga de Fricassé (Turtle Fricassée)
author: Lucas Rigaud
body:
## Ingredients

- turtle
- water
- onion slices
- fine herbs
- butter
- flour
- broth
- salt
- pepper
- eggs
- sage
- lemon juice

## Directions

1. Place a pot on the fire with water, onion slices, and fine herbs
2. When boiling, put the turtles inside with heads and feet cut off
3. When they are stiffened and can easily have their shells separated, remove the meat
4. Clean the meat, cut into quarters, and brown in butter mixed with a little flour
5. Add a drop of broth and season with salt, pepper, and fine herbs
6. When cooked and bound with eggs and chopped sage, finish with lemon juice
7. Serve hot as an entrée
source_title: Cozinheiro moderno, ou nova arte de cozinha

title: Tartaruga de Molho Pardo (Turtle in Brown Sauce)
author: Lucas Rigaud
body:
## Ingredients

- cooked turtle
- butter
- flour
- onion
- wine
- cullis
- salt
- pepper
- herbs
- capers
- lemon juice

## Directions

1. After cooking and cutting into quarters, transfer to a pan with butter and browned flour
2. Brown them with chopped onion
3. Add a glass of wine and a tablespoon of cullis
4. Season with salt, pepper, and the previous herbs
5. Let simmer little by little
6. When cooked and the sauce is reduced and of good flavor, add some capers
7. Serve with lemon juice
source_title: Cozinheiro moderno, ou nova arte de cozinha

title: Tartarugas para Dias de Carne (Turtle for Meat Days)
author: Lucas Rigaud
body:
## Ingredients

- sea turtle
- water
- salt
- bacon
- pepper
- sage
- shallots
- veal
- fine herbs
- white wine
- spicy sauce or vegetable ragú

## Directions

1. Cook the turtle in water and salt
2. Cut into quarters and clean
3. Lard with bacon seasoned with salt, pepper, sage, and chopped shallots
4. Cook in a braise between bacon slabs, veal slabs, fine herbs, and a drop of white wine
5. When cooked and dried, serve with spicy sauce or vegetable ragú that seems best
source_title: Cozinheiro moderno, ou nova arte de cozinha

title: Tarteletas (Tartlets)
author: Lucas Rigaud
body:
## Ingredients

- Puff pastry
- Cream à franchipana or fruit preserve
- Sugar

## Directions

1. Stretch on the table a piece of puff pastry that is a little thicker than a new silver cruzado
2. Cut it into rounds, place in small forms for pastries
3. Garnish the middle with cream à franchipana or any fruit made into preserve
4. Cover with some strips of dough with relief around the edge
5. Put to cook in the oven for half an hour
6. Glaze with sugar with a hot spatula, and serve for a side dish
source_title: Cozinheiro moderno, ou nova arte de cozinha

title: Tegelada de Carneiro (Mutton Tegel)
body:
## Ingredients

- two arratels of mutton, chopped
- half arratel of bacon with herbs
- caldo
- vinegar
- all spices
- two eggs
- bread slices
- four eggs, beaten

## Directions

1. Chop two arratels of mutton with half arratel of bacon and herbs
2. Braise in a tegel with one spoonful of broth
3. When cooked, season with vinegar and all spices
4. When dry, thicken with two eggs like pastry curds
5. Place the meat in a frying pan over bread slices
6. Over the meat place other slices dipped in four beaten eggs
7. Drizzle remaining egg mixed with lemon juice over the slices
8. When fried golden, serve at table
source_title: Arte de cozinha

title: Terrina de Coelhinhos de Lebre (Hare Terrine)
author: Lucas Rigaud
body:
## Ingredients

- One or two hares
- Medium larding bacon, well seasoned
- Bacon slices for the bottom and around a terrine dish
- Hare fillets
- Salt
- Pepper
- Fine herbs
- Truffles
- Veal or beef slices, beaten
- Bacon slices for covering
- Ham essence
- Lime juice

## Directions

1. Skin one or two hares and remove the meat from the thighs and loins
2. Lard with medium bacon well seasoned
3. Line the bottom and around a terrine dish with bacon slices
4. Arrange the hare fillets inside, seasoned with salt, pepper, fine herbs, and truffles at intervals
5. Cover with beaten veal or beef slices, then with bacon slices
6. Put the lid on and seal with dough
7. Cook over gentle heat
8. When cooked, remove the veal, beef, and bacon slices and all the fat
9. Add a spoonful of ham essence
10. Serve hot with lime juice
source_title: Cozinheiro moderno, ou nova arte de cozinha

title: Terrina de Filetes de Lebre (Terrine of Hare Fillets)
author: Lucas Rigaud
body:
## Ingredients

- one or two hares
- meat from thighs and loins
- medium lard
- bacon planks
- hare fillets
- salt
- pepper
- bundle of fine herbs
- truffles
- veal or calf planks

## Directions

1. Skin one or two hares, lightly remove the meat from the thighs and loins
2. Lard it with medium lard well seasoned
3. Line the bottom and around a terrine with bacon planks, arrange inside the hare fillets seasoned with salt, pepper, a bundle of fine herbs, and some truffles at intervals
4. Cover with veal or calf planks beaten, garnish with bacon planks, put on the lid
source_title: Cozinheiro moderno, ou nova arte de cozinha

title: Terrina de Lombos de Lebre para Fiambre (Hare Loin Terrine for Cold Service)
author: Lucas Rigaud
body:
## Ingredients

- Two or three hares
- Medium bacon for larding, seasoned with salt, pepper, spices, sausage, garlic, thyme, bay leaf, and marjoram
- Good butter
- Half a quartilho of brandy
- A bundle of sausage
- Veal and bacon slices for covering

## Directions

1. Remove the loins and meat from two or three hares
2. After trimming and equalizing them, lard with medium bacon seasoned with salt, pepper, spices, sausage, garlic, thyme, bay leaf, and marjoram, all in powder
3. Arrange in a small pan with good butter, half a quartilho of brandy, and a bundle of sausage
4. Cover with veal and bacon slices
5. Cook over gentle heat for five or six hours
6. When cooked and with little sauce, arrange the loins in their terrine and pour the sauce over them after passing through a sieve
7. Cover with the same bacon slices, let cool, and serve for cold service
source_title: Cozinheiro moderno, ou nova arte de cozinha

title: Terrina de Peito de Vitela com Ervilhas (Veal Breast Terrine with Peas)
author: Lucas Rigaud
body:
## Ingredients

- veal breasts
- lettuce
- peas
- rendered pork belly
- piece of ham
- substance broth
- cullis

## Directions

1. Cut equal pieces of veal breasts
2. Parboil them, trim them, and put them to cook in a braise with some lettuces already boiled in water and tied
3. Take some peas, stew them in rendered pork belly and a piece of ham
4. Once stewed, add to them a little substance broth and a little cullis
5. When well seasoned, cooked and of good taste, arrange the pieces of veal in the terrine after cooking with the lettuce cut into pieces
6. Pour the ragù of peas over the top
7. Serve hot as an entrance course
source_title: Cozinheiro moderno, ou nova arte de cozinha

title: Terrina de Perdizes com Lentilhas (Partridge Terrine with Lentils)
author: Lucas Rigaud
body:
## Ingredients

- lentils
- water
- broth
- piece of streaky pork belly or ham
- roasted partridge
- onion studded with cloves
- celery
- head of garlic
- veal substance
- cullis

## Directions

1. Wash and parboil the lentils in water that comes to a boil
2. Cook them in broth with a piece of streaky pork belly or ham, adding a roasted partridge, an onion studded with cloves, a piece of celery, and a head of garlic
3. Once cooked, remove the fat
4. Pass through a sieve with veal substance and a little cullis
5. Place over heat and arrange the partridges that are to be cooked as above
6. Serve, pouring the cullis of the lentils over the top
source_title: Cozinheiro moderno, ou nova arte de cozinha

title: Terrina de Perdizes com Repolho (Partridge Terrine with Cabbage)
author: Lucas Rigaud
body:
## Ingredients

- cabbage
- water
- streaky pork belly
- substance broth
- cullis of veal and ham

## Directions

1. Serve the cabbage in water with streaky pork belly
2. After parboiling, pass it to cold water, squeeze it, and tie it with twine
3. Leave it in a pot with substance broth and a spoonful of braising liquid with some fat
4. Let it simmer slowly
5. When cooked, arrange the partridges at the bottom of the terrine with the cabbage and streaky pork belly interspersed and in pieces on top
6. Add a cullis of veal and ham well finished
7. Serve hot
source_title: Cozinheiro moderno, ou nova arte de cozinha

title: Terrina Real (Royal Terrine)
author: Lucas Rigaud
body:
## Ingredients

- two partridges
- two guinea fowls
- four pigeons
- two rabbits
- six quails or doves
- some pieces of beef loin
- four lamb loins
- pork belly lard
- salt
- pepper
- spices
- fine herbs
- parsley
- marjoram
- bay leaves
- sheets of beef and veal
- sheets of pork belly
- ragù of truffles, mushrooms, sweetbreads, and combs

## Directions

1. Trim and prepare the following meats and birds
2. Lard them with seasoned pork belly: two partridges, two guinea fowls, four pigeons, two rabbits, six quails or doves, some pieces of beef loin, and four lamb loins
3. Season everything with salt, pepper, spices, and fine herbs
4. Line the bottom of a pot with sheets of pork belly
5. Arrange all the meats on top, interspersed
6. Add a layer of parsley, marjoram, and bay leaves
7. Cover everything with sheets of beaten beef and veal
8. Top with sheets of pork belly
9. Cook slowly and gently between hot coals for five or six hours
10. When cooked, remove the pieces of loin and all the birds
11. Place them in the terrine that is to be served
12. Pour over them a ragù of truffles, mushrooms, sweetbreads, and combs well finished
13. Add to it the braising liquid
14. Serve as an entrance course
source_title: Cozinheiro moderno, ou nova arte de cozinha

title: Tigelada de Leite (Milk Tigelada)
body:
## Ingredients

- Milk
- Six egg yolks
- Three quarters sugar
- Bread of ló or flour, grated
- Flower water
- Cinnamon

## Directions

1. Beat one pint of milk with six egg yolks, three quarters of sugar, grated bread of ló or flour, and a small amount of flower water.
2. Pour this into a frying pan and brown it.
3. Once browned, place cinnamon on top and send to the table.
source_title: Arte de cozinha

title: Tigelada de Queijo (Cheese Tigelada)
body:
## Ingredients

- Cow butter
- Flemish cheese
- Breadcrumbs
- Eggs
- Clarified sugar

## Directions

1. Place a small amount of melted cow butter at the bottom of a frying pan, and a layer of sliced Flemish cheese (if salted, soak it in water first).
2. Over the cheese place another layer of breadcrumbs with small pieces of cheese and butter, and a spoonful of beaten eggs on top.
3. Fill the frying pan with these layers.
4. Using a knife, make openings down the middle and along the sides.
5. Pour clarified sugar over it and send to the oven.
source_title: Arte de cozinha

title: Timbale di Macarroni Italiano (Italian Macaroni Timbale)
author: Lucas Rigaud
body:
## Ingredients

- Macaroni
- Water
- Cow's milk
- Cinnamon, grated
- Fresh butter
- Parmesan cheese, grated
- Red jam and some strips of pastry
- Pastry sheets

## Directions

1. Boil the macaroni in water for seven or eight minutes
2. Drain in a sieve
3. Put in two or three cups of hot cow's milk
4. Cover and place over moderate heat until swollen and cooked
5. Drain the milk
6. Season with grated cinnamon, fresh butter, and grated Parmesan cheese
7. Place a thin pastry sheet over the pasta strips
8. Put the macaroni inside
9. Cover with another piece of pastry
10. Seal with eggs
11. Bake in the oven for one hour
12. Turn the timbale onto its plate and serve hot
source_title: Cozinheiro moderno, ou nova arte de cozinha

title: Timbales de Angulas e Outros Peixes (Timbale of Eels and Other Fish)
author: Lucas Rigaud
body:
## Ingredients

- Eels (angulas)
- Butter
- Flour
- Substance (broth)
- White wine
- Salt
- Pepper
- Onion studded with cloves
- Bundle of fine herbs and sauce
- Prawn tails and coulis
- Tender pastry or puff pastry
- Fish forcemeat
- Fish
- Pastry lid
- Eggs, beaten

## Directions

1. Clean the eels and cut them into pieces
2. Sauté them in butter and browned flour
3. After sautéing, add some broth and white wine
4. Season with salt, pepper, studded onion, and a bundle of fine herbs and sauce
5. Let them cook; when cooked, add prawn tails and coulis
6. Meanwhile, line a casserole on the inside with tender or puff pastry
7. Place a fish forcemeat on top
8. Put the eels with all their sauce inside, but cold
9. Cover with the same forcemeat
10. Seal with a pastry lid, sealed around the edge with beaten eggs
11. Place in the oven to bake
12. When cooked, open it and add a little piquant coulis inside
13. Serve hot as an entrance course
source_title: Cozinheiro moderno, ou nova arte de cozinha

title: Timbales de Biscoitos (Biscuit Timbales)
author: Lucas Rigaud
body:
## Ingredients

- Eggs
- Flour
- Fine sugar

## Directions

1. Take six eggs, flour, and an amount of fine sugar equal to half the flour
2. Observe the same method as in the Onion Cake
3. Place in small copper molds greased with clarified butter
4. Bake in the oven with moderate heat
5. When cooked, serve as is and well covered with white icing
source_title: Cozinheiro moderno, ou nova arte de cozinha

title: Timbales de Filetes de Linguados para Dias de Carne ou para Dias de Peixe (Timbale of Sole Fillets for Meat Days or Fish Days)
author: Lucas Rigaud
body:
## Ingredients

- Sole fillets
- Bacon strips or buttered paper sheets
- Eggs, beaten
- Meat or fish forcemeat
- Truffles
- Sole fillets
- Prawn tails
- Sauce á l'Espagnole or lemon juice

## Directions

1. Line the bottom and sides of a timbale or casserole with bacon strips if for a meat day, or with buttered paper sheets if for a fish day
2. Arrange the fillets inside around the edge, neatly aligned and stuck together with beaten eggs
3. Cover the bottom of the center and all around with forcemeat of meat or fish according to the day
4. Place in the middle a ragout of truffles, sole fillets, and prawn tails
5. Finish covering with the same forcemeat
6. Top with bacon strips or buttered paper sheets
7. Bake in the oven
8. When cooked, remove the bacon or paper, carefully turn it onto its plate, remove the bacon or paper, drain all the fat
9. Serve with Spanish sauce or lemon juice
source_title: Cozinheiro moderno, ou nova arte de cozinha

title: Tordos Guizado (Braised Thrushes)
author: Lucas Rigaud
body:
## Ingredients

- One dozen thrushes
- Melted bacon
- Flour
- White wine
- Salt
- Pepper
- Capelet with onion
- Herbs
- Cloves
- Lemon juice
- Olives or juniper berries

## Directions

1. Take one dozen thrushes, pluck and singe them
2. Straighten them by putting their legs inside the body
3. Rub them with melted bacon
4. Dust them with flour
5. Place them in a pan with white wine, salt, pepper, one capelet with onion, herbs, and two cloves
6. Simmer gently
7. When cooked and bound with a little essence, serve with lemon juice
8. They can also be served with olives or juniper berries cooked in water
source_title: Cozinheiro moderno, ou nova arte de cozinha

title: Torrias de Gallinhola (Chicken Fritters)
body:
## Ingredients

- one chicken breast (or liver and giblets of chicken, soaked)
- one quarter pound of sugar, finely ground
- ground cinnamon
- four egg yolks
- bread slices
- flour
- butter or oil for frying

## Directions

1. Chop the chicken breast (or liver and giblets) finely with the finely ground sugar, ground cinnamon, and four egg yolks
2. Place bread slices in a pan or frying vessel with flour underneath
3. Put the chopped mixture on top of the bread
4. Place over coals, and after browning with coals on top, remove and send to the table
source_title: Arte de cozinha

title: Torta de Amêndoas e de Pistáchos (Almond and Pistachio Pie)
author: Lucas Rigaud
body:
## Ingredients

- Quarter pound of almonds and pistachios, ground
- Milk drops
- A little well-bound cream
- Citron peel, lemon peel and orange flower
- All minced
- Beef marrow, melted
- Some sugar
- Four egg yolks with well-beaten egg whites
- Puff pastry dough

## Directions

1. Grind a quarter pound of almonds and pistachios, moistening with drops of milk to prevent them from releasing their oil
2. Mix after grinding with a little well-bound cream, minced citron peel, lemon peel and orange flower
3. Add melted beef marrow and some sugar
4. Strain everything and bind with four egg yolks with well-beaten and lifted egg whites
5. Place all this mixture on puff pastry dough with only its edges around it
6. Bake in the oven with moderate heat
7. When cooked and with good color, serve hot as a between course dish; but for fish days, add butter instead of marrow
source_title: Cozinheiro moderno, ou nova arte de cozinha

title: Torta de Arroz (Rice Pie)
body:
## Ingredients

- One arratel of rice
- Half pint of water
- One arratel of sugar in thread stage
- Six egg yolks
- Flower water
- Cinnamon
- Puff pastry

## Directions

1. Soak one arratel of rice in half pint of water.
2. Cook it in one arratel of sugar in thread stage.
3. Thicken it with six egg yolks.
4. Add flower water and cinnamon and allow to cool.
5. Make the pie with puff pastry, bake it, and send to the table.
6. If made with milk, it is better.
source_title: Arte de cozinha

title: Torta de Carneiro (Mutton Pie)
body:
## Ingredients

- Three arratels of finely chopped mutton
- Half an arratel of chopped bacon
- Six eggs
- Aromatics
- One spoon of broth
- One splash of vinegar
- All seasonings
- Four eggs for binding
- Water
- Salt
- French puff pastry

## Directions

1. Brown the finely chopped mutton with half an arratel of bacon, six eggs, and aromatics, adding one spoon of broth and one splash of vinegar
2. When browned, season with all seasonings
3. Thicken with four eggs so the meat becomes very dry, and let cool
4. Make dough with water and salt, knead very well, make French puff pastry or the desired type, arranging six layers below and six above
5. When the meat is in the pie with two beaten egg yolks on top and finished, cook on gentle heat and serve
source_title: Arte de cozinha

title: Torta de Creme Gelado com Pistáchos (Frozen Cream Pie with Pistachios)
author: Lucas Rigaud
body:
## Ingredients

- Half pound of pistachios
- Three quarter-liters of milk, boiled
- Half pound of sugar
- A piece of cinnamon stick
- Lemon peel
- Twelve egg yolks
- Snow
- Puff pastry or almond dough or hazelnut dough or sugar, flour and eggs dough

## Directions

1. Shell the pistachios, remove the skin and grind them in a stone mortar, wetting them occasionally with a drop of milk
2. Dissolve the ground pistachios in three quarter-liters of boiled milk with half pound of sugar, a piece of cinnamon stick and lemon peel
3. When somewhat warm, strain everything through a sieve with twelve egg yolks and return to the fire, stirring constantly with a spoon
4. When bound and before it boils, let it cool
5. Place in a freezer with snow around it and stir while freezing as is customary
6. Serve on bases of almond dough, hazelnut dough or sugar, flour and eggs dough
7. For frozen fruit pies, when the milk is tempered with salt, sugar, cinnamon and lemon peel with beaten egg yolks, bind it on the fire, and after binding, strain it through a sieve with any fruit cooked first in sugar, freeze as above and serve in the same manner
source_title: Cozinheiro moderno, ou nova arte de cozinha

title: Torta de Espargos (Asparagus Tart)
body:
## Ingredients

- asparagus
- water
- herbs
- butter
- seasonings
- lemon juice
- egg yolks
- pastry dough
- butter
- sugar
- eggs
- white wine

## Directions

1. Cook the asparagus with three waters
2. Sauté them in herbs that must already be sautéed on the heat
3. Once cooked and seasoned with all the seasonings and plenty of lemon juice, bind them with six egg yolks and let the sauce be thick
4. Let them cool
5. Make the tart dough very well kneaded with butter, sugar, eggs, and white wine
6. Once made with asparagus inside, cook it
7. Serve at table
source_title: Arte de cozinha

title: Torta de Espinafres (Spinach Pie)
author: Lucas Rigaud
body:
## Ingredients

- Spinach
- Butter
- Peel of citron, orange and lemon
- A spoonful of minced parsley
- Salt, sugar and two egg yolks
- Puff pastry dough

## Directions

1. Boil the spinach in water, mince it and squeeze it out
2. Sauté it for a moment with butter
3. Place it in a mortar with minced peel of citron, orange and lemon
4. Add a spoonful of minced parsley, salt, sugar and two egg yolks
5. Make the pie with puff pastry dough as is customary
6. When cooked and glazed with sugar and hot, serve between courses
source_title: Cozinheiro moderno, ou nova arte de cozinha

title: Torta de Franchiapana (Franchipane Pie)
author: Lucas Rigaud
body:
## Ingredients

- Bound cream
- Biscuits of sweet and bitter almonds
- Peel of citron, orange flower and saffron
- A little sugar
- Five or six egg yolks
- A piece of clarified butter
- Puff pastry dough

## Directions

1. Make a bound cream as for frying
2. Add sweet and bitter almond biscuits, peel of citron, orange flower and saffron, all minced
3. Add a little sugar, five or six egg yolks, and a piece of clarified butter
4. Mix everything well and place in a baking dish with puff pastry dough underneath and finished as before
5. Serve in the same manner
source_title: Cozinheiro moderno, ou nova arte de cozinha

title: Torta de Galinhollas (Woodcock Pie)
author: Lucas Rigaud
body:
## Ingredients

- Woodcock
- Salt
- Pepper
- Fine herbs
- Bacon
- Truffle
- Tender or puff pastry
- Veal slices
- Butter
- Onion

## Directions

1. After plucking and roasting the woodcock, cut it into four parts: wings and thighs
2. From the rest of the meat, livers, and entrails make a chopped mixture
3. After chopping in a mortar with scraped bacon, a truffle, little salt, and pepper, all chopped
4. Cover the bottom of a pie dish with tender or puff pastry
5. Place the chopped mixture on top
6. Arrange the quarters of woodcock seasoned with salt, pepper, fine herbs, a little onion, and a piece of fresh butter
7. Cover everything with beaten veal slices and bacon
8. On top place a sheet of paste like the one below
9. Gild with egg
source_title: Cozinheiro moderno, ou nova arte de cozinha

title: Torta de Limão (Lemon Tart)
body:
## Ingredients

- a dozen lemons sliced thinly
- one and a half arratels of sugar at thread stage
- French puff pastry dough
- slices of citron
- sugar for topping

## Directions

1. Blanch a dozen lemons sliced thinly with all pith removed in two boilings of water until they no longer taste bitter.
2. Finish cooking them in one and a half arratels of sugar at thread stage.
3. When the syrup is thick, let cool.
4. Once the puff pastry tart is made, put the lemon mixture inside, place a layer of citron slices on top, and close it.
5. After baking, send to the table with sugar on top.
source_title: Arte de cozinha

title: Torta de Manjar Real (Royal Almond Paste Tart)
body:
## Ingredients

- six bowlfuls of royal almond paste
- half a dozen egg yolks
- flower water
- French puff pastry dough

## Directions

1. Beat six bowlfuls of royal almond paste with half a dozen egg yolks and flower water.
2. Once well beaten, make a French puff pastry tart and put the royal almond paste inside.
3. After baking, send to the table.
4. In the same way a white almond paste tart is made.
source_title: Arte de cozinha

title: Torta de Marmellos (Quince Tart)
body:
## Ingredients

- two arratels of quinces in quarters
- one and a half arratels of sugar
- clove
- cinnamon
- a dozen egg yolks
- one arratel of sugar

## Directions

1. Scald two arratels of quinces in quarters and cook in one and a half arratels of sugar with clove and cinnamon.
2. When the syrup is thick, let cool.
3. Make beaten eggs from a dozen egg yolks in one arratel of sugar and let cool.
4. Put the quinces in the tart with the syrup, cinnamon, and eggs on top.
5. Close it and after baking send to the table.
6. In this way tarts of camasses and any other fruit are made.
source_title: Arte de cozinha

title: Torta de Maçãs ou de Frangos (Apple or Chicken Pie)
author: Lucas Rigaud
body:
## Ingredients

- Apples or chickens
- Bacon or melted butter
- Truffles
- Salt and pepper
- Puff pastry dough
- Minced meat
- Bay leaf studded with cloves
- A little minced parsley and fresh butter
- Bacon strips
- Egg yolks
- Orange juice

## Directions

1. Prepare the apples or chickens with feet tucked inside and once stiffened, fry in bacon or melted butter
2. Mince truffles and season with salt and pepper
3. Spread a piece of puff pastry dough on a baking dish
4. Add a layer of minced meat, arrange the apples or chickens on top with parsley sprigs
5. Add a layer of fried bread, a bay leaf studded with cloves, a little minced parsley and fresh butter
6. Cover with bacon strips and another piece of puff pastry dough that is sealed and browned
7. Bake in the oven for about two hours
8. Once cooked, open it, remove the bacon strips and bay leaf, add a sauce made from egg yolks, truffles, mushrooms, and serve hot with orange juice
source_title: Cozinheiro moderno, ou nova arte de cozinha

title: Torta de Nata (Cream Pie)
body:
## Ingredients

- Six bowls of cream
- One dozen egg yolks
- Half arratel of grated bread of ló or five réis of grated bread
- One arratel of sugar in thread stage

## Directions

1. Place in a pot six bowls of cream, one dozen egg yolks, half arratel of grated bread of ló or five réis of grated bread, and one arratel of sugar in thread stage.
2. Beat everything very well.
3. Allow it to boil, and when it is thick allow it to cool.
4. Make the pie with puff pastry, fill it with the cream mixture, bake it, and send to the table.
5. The same method is used for curd cheese and milk pies, but milk requires more eggs.
6. Fritters, almojavenas, and small pastries shaped like half-moons can also be made this way.
7. Breads of ten réis can also be hollowed out, filled with cream, browned, and sent to the table.
source_title: Arte de cozinha

title: Torta de Peitos de Perdizes ou de Capões (Partridge or Capon Breast Pie)
author: Lucas Rigaud
body:
## Ingredients

- Partridges or capons
- Quarter pound of sweet almonds, ground
- Peel of citron, orange and lemon
- Two spoonfuls of well-bound cream
- One handful of sugar
- Four egg yolks
- Beef marrow, minced
- Puff pastry dough

## Directions

1. Pluck the partridges or capons and remove the breasts, clean them after plucking
2. Grind the breasts in a mortar in which you have already placed a quarter pound of ground sweet almonds
3. Add peels of citron, orange and lemon, two spoonfuls of well-bound cream, one handful of sugar, four egg yolks, and minced beef marrow
4. Spread a piece of puff pastry dough on a baking dish, place all the mixture on top
5. Cover with strips of the same dough and seal the edges all around as is customary
6. Bake in the oven and under a lid; when cooked, serve glazed with sugar and hot
source_title: Cozinheiro moderno, ou nova arte de cozinha

title: Torta de Peixe (Fish Pie)
body:
## Ingredients

- small amount of parsley
- onion
- two portions of any fish
- vinegar
- black seasonings
- shrimp or clams or mussels
- four egg yolks
- pastry dough

## Directions

1. Chop a small amount of parsley and onion very well and put them to stew
2. After stewed, chop two portions of any fish very well and put them to stew in the same herbs with vinegar
3. When cooked, season with all the seasonings, add shrimp or clams or mussels, bind with four egg yolks, and set to cool
4. Make the dough as desired, cook the pie, and send it to the table
source_title: Arte de cozinha

title: Torta de Presunto Agro Doce (Sweet and Sour Ham Pie)
body:
## Ingredients

- two arratels of ham
- one arratel of sugar
- one cup of white wine
- cinnamon
- clove
- nutmeg grated
- flour for pastry dough
- butter for pastry dough

## Directions

1. Cut the ham into small pieces and soak for twenty-four hours
2. Cook in one arratel of sugar at the point of soft-ball stage, with one cup of white wine, cinnamon, and clove all whole, and grated nutmeg, and let cool
3. Make the dough in the form of common pastries
4. Make two crusts; place the ham with some syrup on one crust, and cover with the other
5. Seal the pie well, cook on gentle heat, pour the syrup in which the ham was cooked through two holes made in the middle, and serve hot to the table
source_title: Arte de cozinha

title: Torta de Prezunto Agro Doce (Sweet and Sour Ham Pie)
body:
## Ingredients

- Two arratels of ham, sliced
- One arratel of sugar in thread stage
- One cup of wine

## Directions

1. Soak ham slices for twenty-four hours, then cut into small slices
2. Cook in one arratel of sugar in thread stage with one cup of wine
source_title: Arte de cozinha

title: Torta de Rim de Vitela (Calf Kidney Pie)
author: Lucas Rigaud
body:
## Ingredients

- One calf liver
- Bound cream
- Biscuits of almond paste
- Peel of orange, citron and lemon
- Six egg yolks with well-beaten egg whites
- Sugar
- Puff pastry dough

## Directions

1. Roast a calf liver, remove the kidney with all its fat, let it cool
2. Mince it well finely; when minced, grind it with the same amount of bound cream, almond biscuits, minced peels of orange, citron and lemon
3. After everything is ground, add six egg yolks, sugar and well-beaten egg whites
4. Spread a piece of puff pastry dough on a baking dish, form its border of two fingers width of the same dough, place the mixture in the middle
5. Put in the oven to bake
source_title: Cozinheiro moderno, ou nova arte de cozinha

title: Torta de Rim de Vitela (Veal Kidney Tart)
author: Lucas Rigaud
body:
## Ingredients

- one thumb-sized piece of veal
- veal kidney with all its fat
- bound cream
- biscuits of almonds
- spoonfuls of orange zest
- spoonfuls of citron zest
- spoonfuls of lime zest
- six egg yolks
- sugar
- egg whites beaten to snow

## Directions

1. Take a thumb-sized piece of veal, remove the kidney with all its fat, allow it to cool, and then chop it very finely
2. Once chopped, pound it with an equal amount of bound cream, biscuits of almonds, spoonfuls of orange zest, citron zest, and lime zest, all chopped finely
3. After everything is pounded, add six egg yolks, sugar, and the egg whites beaten to snow
4. Place a piece of puff pastry on a tart pan, form its border the width of two fingers with the same pastry, place the composition in the middle, and put it in the oven to bake
5. When baked and browned, pour a little sugar on top and serve hot
source_title: Cozinheiro moderno, ou nova arte de cozinha

title: Torta de Toucinho (Bacon Pie)
body:
## Ingredients

- One arratel of finely chopped bacon
- One arratel of finely ground almonds
- One arratel of sugar in thread stage
- Ambergris or amber
- Cinnamon
- Indian clove
- Eight egg yolks
- One eighth of flour
- Half an arratel of butter
- Four egg yolks
- Half an arratel of sugar
- One cup of white wine

## Directions

1. Cook in a hollow pot one arratel of finely chopped bacon with one arratel of finely ground almonds and one arratel of sugar in thread stage
2. When cooked, add ambergris or amber, cinnamon, and Indian clove
3. Thicken with eight egg yolks and let cool
4. Make dough with one eighth of flour, half an arratel of butter, four egg yolks, half an arratel of sugar, and one cup of white wine
5. After kneading, make two cakes, place the aforementioned bacon mixture on one, cover with the other cake, work the pie well, cook on gentle heat, and serve
source_title: Arte de cozinha

title: Tortas de Agraço (Verjuice Tarts)
body:
## Ingredients

- two arratels of verjuice berries
- boiling water
- cold water
- two arratels of sugar at espadana stage
- cinnamon
- clove
- five réis of grated bread for thickening
- musk
- French puff pastry dough

## Directions

1. Scald two arratels of verjuice berries in boiling water and pass through cold water.
2. Cook in two arratels of sugar at espadana stage with cinnamon, clove, five réis of grated bread for thickening, and musk.
3. Let cool while making the French puff pastry tart.
4. Once cooked, send to the table.
source_title: Arte de cozinha

title: Tortas de Ginjas (Sour Cherry Tarts)
body:
## Ingredients

- two arratels of sour cherries
- hot water
- two arratels of sugar at thread stage
- cinnamon
- clove
- one eighth of flour for French puff pastry
- one arratel of cow butter

## Directions

1. Remove the stems from two arratels of sour cherries and pass through hot water.
2. Remove the pits and cook in two arratels of sugar at thread stage with cinnamon and clove.
3. When very thick, let cool.
4. Make French puff pastry by kneading one eighth of flour and well worked, spread this dough on the board very well extended.
5. Place one arratel of cow butter on top, fold the dough so the butter does not appear, and do the same two more times, extending it with the palm of the hand.
6. Make the tart, put the cherries inside, brush it, and send it to the oven.
7. In the same way covered box pastries can be made.
source_title: Arte de cozinha

title: Tortas de Mexilhões (Mussel Pies)
body:
## Ingredients

- small amount of parsley
- onion
- mussels with vinegar
- eggs
- pastry dough

## Directions

1. Chop a small amount of parsley and onion very well and put it to stew
2. After stewed, add the mussels with their vinegar
3. When boiling, season with eggs and set to cool
4. Make the pie and after cooking send it to the table
source_title: Arte de cozinha

title: Tortas de Pombos, Enatas (Pigeon Pie with Cream)
body:
## Ingredients

- Four roasted pigeons, meat picked
- Six bowls of cream
- Twelve egg yolks
- Half an arratel of sugar
- Clove
- Cinnamon

## Directions

1. Chop the meat of four roasted pigeons and mix with six bowls of cream, twelve egg yolks, and half an arratel of sugar
2. Add clove and cinnamon
3. Make the pie, cook, and serve
source_title: Arte de cozinha

title: Tortas de Pêssegos, de Amêndoas, Damascos e Maçãs (Peach, Almond, Apricot and Apple Pies)
author: Lucas Rigaud
body:
## Ingredients

- Puff pastry dough
- Fine sugar
- Peaches, almonds, apricots or apples, peeled and halved
- More fine sugar

## Directions

1. Cover the bottom of a baking dish with a piece of puff pastry dough
2. Cover the center with fine sugar, place the peaches, almonds, apricots or apples halved and pitted on top
3. Cover with fine sugar as underneath
4. Enclose the pie with strips of dough, make a border around it of two fingers width
5. Place in the oven to bake; when cooked, glaze with sugar and serve hot between courses
6. If the peaches are not ripe, cook them in sugar first and then make the pies as is customary for pears, apples, marinellos, cherries, verjuice, strawberries, and other fruits
source_title: Cozinheiro moderno, ou nova arte de cozinha

title: Tortas do Rio (River Fish Pies)
body:
## Ingredients

- trout
- water
- vinegar
- parsley
- salt
- vinegar for the conserve
- water for the conserve
- salt for the conserve
- olive oil for the conserve

## Directions

1. Wash the trout very well in water so they do not have any sand, open them very little only to remove the gills and some of the innards
2. Place them in a bowl with a little vinegar, water, parsley, and seasoned with salt, all boiling
3. While boiling, place the trout inside, letting them take only one boiling, then remove them and place them on a plate or where they are to remain, cold
4. For the conserve: take one part strong vinegar and two parts water, or if the vinegar is mild, equal parts, in quantity enough so the fruits are covered
5. Boil all the water and vinegar with a small amount of parsley, seasoning with salt, and after boiling well, remove from heat and let cool
6. After cold, pour it over the trout so they remain fresh, and make sure they are well covered with this conserve
source_title: Arte de cozinha

title: Tortija de Nata (Cream Fritters)
body:
## Ingredients

- Cream
- Eggs
- Sugar
- Butter
- Cinnamon

## Directions

1. Beat a small amount of cream with eggs and sugar until the mixture is well beaten.
2. Pour it into a low baking pan, greased with butter, no more than a finger's height.
3. Cook it over low heat, with heat from below and above.
4. Allow it to cool.
5. Once cold, make three cuts lengthwise and three crosswise so that the fritters are square.
6. Coat them with beaten eggs and egg whites.
7. Fry them in good butter and pass them through sugar in thread stage.
8. Place them over slices of bread of ló, with cinnamon on top, and send hot to the table.
9. This can also be made with grated bread or flour, and similarly tortijas can be made with curd cheese.
source_title: Arte de cozinha

title: Trouxa de Ovos com Rins de Vitela (Egg Bundle with Veal Kidneys)
author: Lucas Rigaud
body:
## Ingredients

- veal kidney with all its fat
- butter
- salt
- pepper
- herbs
- chopped chives
- half a quarter of milk
- eggs
- essence sauce

## Directions

1. Roast with all its fat a veal kidney, let it cool, and after cold chop very finely
2. When chopped, sauté in melted butter, seasoned with salt, pepper, herbs, and chopped chives
3. Add half a quarter of milk
4. Break the necessary eggs in another casserole, then mix, beat everything together
5. Cook as above on both sides
6. Serve with hot essence sauce
source_title: Cozinheiro moderno, ou nova arte de cozinha

title: Trouxas com Queijo Parmesão (Bundles with Parmesan Cheese)
author: Lucas Rigaud
body:
## Ingredients

- eggs
- ground pepper
- grated cheese
- clarified butter
- breadcrumbs

## Directions

1. Beat eggs and season with ground pepper and grated cheese
2. Make three or four bundles with clarified butter
3. Place on a tortilla pan, dusted with grated cheese
4. Once browned like meatballs, arrange on a plate
5. Sprinkle with butter
6. Cover with breadcrumbs
7. Bake in the oven
8. Once cooked, serve hot
source_title: Cozinheiro moderno, ou nova arte de cozinha

title: Trouxas de Cardo (Thistle Bundles)
body:
## Ingredients

- thistles
- herbs
- butter
- egg

## Directions

1. Chop and sauté the thistles (as mentioned above)
2. Fry it in a beaten egg in the manner of a flattened fried pastry
3. Place the chopped thistle in this pastry
4. Folding it, place them on the plate; in this manner you make the bundles until you fill the plate
source_title: Arte de cozinha

title: Trouxas de Fígados de Corças (Venison Liver Bundles)
author: Lucas Rigaud
body:
## Ingredients

- venison livers
- butter
- parsley
- chives
- salt
- pepper
- herbs
- beaten eggs
- melted butter

## Directions

1. Remove skin from venison livers
2. Sprinkle and then braise with butter, parsley, and chopped chives
3. Season when braised with salt, pepper, and fresh herbs
4. Allow to cool
5. Cold, mix with beaten eggs
6. Mix and make bundles with melted butter
7. Cook on both sides over hot spatula
8. Serve with spicy sauce
source_title: Cozinheiro moderno, ou nova arte de cozinha

title: Trouxas de Ovo com Tutanos de Vaca (Egg Bundles with Beef Marrow)
author: Lucas Rigaud
body:
## Ingredients

- sweet almonds
- bitter almonds
- peaches, apricots, or other sweets
- lemon peel
- beef marrow
- egg yolks
- fine sugar
- salt
- milk
- egg whites
- butter

## Directions

1. Pound sweet almonds and bitter almonds as is customary
2. Add some peaches, apricots, or other sweets, a little grated lemon peel, and as much beef marrow as a handful
3. Pound everything well
4. Add egg yolks
5. Season with fine sugar and salt
6. Dissolve in a little milk
7. Mix with beaten egg whites
8. Line a pan with butter
9. Add the mixture
10. Cook in the oven
11. Once cooked, serve glazed with hot spatula and sugar on top
source_title: Cozinheiro moderno, ou nova arte de cozinha

title: Trouxas de Ovos (Egg Bundles)
body:
## Ingredients

- two dozen egg yolks
- small basin of flour
- two arratels of sugar at espadana point
- soft eggs

## Directions

1. Beat two dozen egg yolks in a small basin of flour with two arratels of sugar at espadana point
2. Once beaten, place in a pot and set over fire to boil
3. Once curdled, cut and turn to cook on the other side
4. Once cooked, form bundles, putting soft eggs inside if desired, pass through sugar at point, and serve with cinnamon on top
source_title: Arte de cozinha

title: Trouxas de Ovos com Açúcar (Egg Bundles with Sugar)
author: Lucas Rigaud
body:
## Ingredients

- egg whites
- egg yolks
- sugar

## Directions

1. Beat egg whites until stiff like snow
2. Cook on both sides
3. When cooked, place carefully on plate
4. Dust with fine sugar
5. Brown with hot spatula
6. Serve as an entrée
source_title: Cozinheiro moderno, ou nova arte de cozinha

title: Trouxas de Ovos com Açúcar (Egg Bundles with Sugar)
author: Lucas Rigaud
body:
## Ingredients

- egg whites
- egg yolks
- chopped citron peel
- covered orange flower
- almond biscuits
- fine sugar
- salt
- a drop of milk
- clarified butter

## Directions

1. Beat with rods and raise a dozen egg whites
2. Add the yolks, chopped citron peel, covered orange flower, all chopped, almond biscuits, fine sugar, salt, and a drop of milk
3. When everything is well mixed, cook as the previous ones in very hot clarified butter
4. After cooked, dust with fine sugar, brown with a hot spatula, and serve as an entrée
source_title: Cozinheiro moderno, ou nova arte de cozinha

title: Trouxas de Ovos com Presunto (Egg Bundles with Ham)
author: Lucas Rigaud
body:
## Ingredients

- a dozen eggs
- cooked and finely chopped ham
- herbs
- half a cup of milk
- salt
- a little pepper
- butter or bacon

## Directions

1. Beat in a casserole a dozen eggs
2. Add cooked and finely chopped ham, herbs, half a cup of milk, salt, and a little pepper
3. Beat everything with a spoon
4. Cook in melted bacon or butter, following the same method as the previous ones
5. After cooked, place on its plate and serve with a little broth and chopped ham on top
source_title: Cozinheiro moderno, ou nova arte de cozinha

title: Trouxas de Ovos com Rim de Vitela por Outro Modo (Egg Bundle with Veal Kidneys Another Way)
author: Lucas Rigaud
body:
## Ingredients

- veal kidney with its fat
- butter
- half a quarter of milk
- chopped lemon peel
- a dozen egg yolks
- fine sugar
- salt
- egg whites

## Directions

1. Roast with all its fat a veal kidney as described above
2. Sauté in cow butter
3. When nearly cold, add half a quarter of milk, chopped lemon peel, a dozen egg yolks, fine sugar, and salt
4. When everything is well mixed, add the beaten egg whites to snow peaks
5. Cook on both sides
6. When cooked, place carefully on its plate
7. Dust with fine sugar, brown with a hot spatula, and serve as an entrée
source_title: Cozinheiro moderno, ou nova arte de cozinha

title: Trouxas de Ovos Moderno (Modern Egg Bundles)
author: Lucas Rigaud
body:
## Ingredients

- egg whites
- egg yolks
- citron peel
- orange flowers
- almond biscuits
- fine sugar
- salt
- milk
- clarified butter

## Directions

1. Beat egg whites with rod and raise them
2. Add citron peel, orange flowers, almond biscuits, all chopped
3. Mix in fine sugar and salt
4. Add a drop of milk
5. Mix everything well
6. Cook as the previous recipe in clarified butter, well heated
7. Once cooked, place on plate and serve glazed with fine sugar and hot spatula as an entrée
source_title: Cozinheiro moderno, ou nova arte de cozinha

title: Trouxas de Ovos à Delfina (Delfina-style Egg Bundles)
author: Lucas Rigaud
body:
## Ingredients

- eggs
- salt
- milk
- butter
- pistachio cream
- sweet cherries
- apricots
- strawberries
- almond paste

## Directions

1. Beat eggs with salt and milk
2. Make three or four bundles with butter
3. Place on a clean cloth
4. Arrange in alternating rows: one of pistachio cream, another of sweet cherries, another of apricots, and another of strawberries
5. Roll up as meatballs
6. Cut into pieces
7. Place each piece on its own base of cooked almond paste
8. Dust with fine sugar
9. Place under a cover with fire on top
10. Once browned, serve as an entrée
source_title: Cozinheiro moderno, ou nova arte de cozinha

title: Trouxas de Vários Modos (Bundles Various Ways)
author: Lucas Rigaud
body:
## Ingredients

- ragout or cream
- beaten eggs
- salt
- pepper
- parsley
- butter or melted lard

## Directions

1. Make bundles from various ragouts, white or brown, or also from creams such as ragouts of truffles, sweetbreads, mushrooms, peas, asparagus tips, broad beans, spinach, sorrel, and various shellfish such as oysters, mussels, and shrimp
2. When well finished and of good taste, mix with beaten eggs
3. Season with salt, pepper, and chopped parsley
4. Form bundles with well-heated butter or melted lard
5. After cooking on both sides, serve with the same ragout they were made with or with any other that is more convenient
source_title: Cozinheiro moderno, ou nova arte de cozinha

title: Trouxas em Polpetas (Bundles as Meatballs)
author: Lucas Rigaud
body:
## Ingredients

- eggs
- salt
- pepper
- chives
- parsley
- butter
- cooked game birds
- clarified butter
- breadcrumbs
- grated cheese
- essence sauce

## Directions

1. Beat eggs and season with salt, pepper, chopped chives and parsley
2. Make three or four bundles with butter
3. Cover each one with chopped cooked meat from game birds such as partridges, chickens, turkeys, etc., of good taste and well finished
4. Roll as other meatballs
5. Arrange on a tortilla pan
6. Sprinkle with clarified butter and egg yolks
7. Cover with breadcrumbs and fine grated cheese
8. Brown in the oven
9. Once browned and cooked, cut into pieces and serve with clear essence sauce as an entrée
source_title: Cozinheiro moderno, ou nova arte de cozinha

title: Trouxas à Bexaméla (Béchamel Bundles)
author: Lucas Rigaud
body:
## Ingredients

- egg whites
- egg yolks
- béchamel sauce
- butter

## Directions

1. Beat fifteen or eighteen egg whites with rod
2. Once raised, mix with all the yolks in a well-bound béchamel of good taste
3. Pour everything into a pan lined and first rubbed inside with butter
4. Bake in the oven
5. Once risen and cooked, serve hot as the previous recipes
source_title: Cozinheiro moderno, ou nova arte de cozinha

title: Trouxas à Nailles (Nailles-style Bundles)
author: Lucas Rigaud
body:
## Ingredients

- milk
- rice flour
- egg yolks
- clarified butter
- citron
- orange flowers
- almond biscuits
- salt
- ground cinnamon
- grated lemon peel
- fine sugar
- egg whites

## Directions

1. Make a thick, well-bound cream with milk and rice flour
2. Once cooled, add egg yolks
3. Add clarified butter, citron, orange flowers, almond biscuits, all chopped
4. Season with salt, ground cinnamon, and grated lemon peel
5. Add fine sugar
6. Mix everything together
7. Add beaten egg whites
8. Put all in a pan as the previous recipe
9. Once cooked, serve in the same manner and hot
source_title: Cozinheiro moderno, ou nova arte de cozinha

title: Trufas Recheadas com Molho de Anchovas (Stuffed Trout with Anchovy Sauce)
author: Lucas Rigaud
body:
## Ingredients

- trout
- olive oil
- salt
- pepper
- sage
- garlic
- chives
- anchovies
- one tablespoon of cullis
- fresh butter
- lemon juice or bitter orange juice
- bread crumbs

## Directions

1. Scale, clean, and prepare the trout with incisions along the sides
2. Marinate in half a quartilho of good olive oil with salt, pepper, sage, garlic, and chopped chives
3. Place in a baking dish or plate with all its marinade
4. Cover with finely grated bread crumbs
5. Bake in the oven until cooked
6. Make the anchovy sauce with two chopped anchovies, one tablespoon of cullis, and a good piece of fresh butter, then bind it and finish with lemon juice
7. Serve the trout hot with the anchovy sauce underneath
source_title: Cozinheiro moderno, ou nova arte de cozinha

title: Trutas Assadas com Molho de Enxovas (Roasted Trout with Anchovy Sauce)
author: Lucas Rigaud
body:
## Ingredients

- trout
- olive oil
- salt
- pepper
- saffron
- garlic
- chives
- breadcrumbs

## Directions

1. Scale, clean, and prepare the trout with incisions on the sides
2. Marinate in a quarter quart of good olive oil with salt, pepper, saffron, finely chopped garlic and chives
3. Place on a baking sheet or plate as is customary, with all its marinade
4. Cover with fine breadcrumbs
5. Place to cook in the oven
6. When cooked, serve with anchovy sauce
source_title: Cozinheiro moderno, ou nova arte de cozinha

title: Trutas Cozidas ao Azul (Trout Cooked Blue)
author: Lucas Rigaud
body:
## Ingredients

- trout
- vinegar
- salt
- pepper
- onion slices
- roots and sprigs of saffron
- thyme
- bay leaf
- marjoram
- garlic cloves
- red wine
- water

## Directions

1. Boil half a gallon of the most vinegary vinegar possible with salt, pepper, onion slices, roots, and sprigs of saffron, thyme, bay leaf, marjoram, and some garlic cloves
2. After it has boiled for some time, pour this hot liquid over the trout, which should be prepared with only the innards and gills removed but with the scales intact in a casserole
3. After a few minutes, add red wine and water so that the trout are covered
4. Let them boil for some minutes
5. When cooked, serve on a folded napkin with sprigs of saffron around
source_title: Cozinheiro moderno, ou nova arte de cozinha

title: Trutas à Genebrinha para huma Entrada (Trout Genebrinha Style as an Appetizer)
author: Lucas Rigaud
body:
## Ingredients

- trout
- butter
- salt
- pepper
- fine herbs
- white or red wine
- meat substance
- saffron
- onion with cloves
- bread crust
- fresh butter
- lemon or sour orange juice

## Directions

1. Scale the trout and remove the gills and innards without opening them
2. Fill the cavity with a piece of butter mixed with a little salt, pepper, and fine herbs
3. Place in a casserole
4. Pour one or two bottles of white or red wine so the trout are covered
5. Season with salt, pepper, a bundle of saffron, fine herbs, and a onion studded with cloves, and a piece of bread crust
6. Let it boil over a strong flame until the fire catches it, when the flame begins to die down, add half a pound of fresh butter to the sauce, not all at once but bit by bit
7. Remove the trout
8. When the sauce is reduced, remove the onion and the bundle
9. Serve over the trout with lemon or sour orange juice
source_title: Cozinheiro moderno, ou nova arte de cozinha

title: Tubaras de Outro Modo (Chitterlings - Fifth Preparation)
body:
## Ingredients

- lamb chitterlings
- pork fat (toucinho)
- pepper
- eggs
- lemon

## Directions

1. Cut the chitterlings into finger-sized pieces
2. Fry in pork fat
3. Top with pepper and two eggs
4. Form into a cartouche like a filhós
5. Serve with lemon on top
source_title: Arte de cozinha

title: Tubaras de Outro Modo (Chitterlings - Fourth Preparation)
body:
## Ingredients

- lamb chitterlings
- pepper
- lemon

## Directions

1. Roast the chitterlings
2. Cut into pieces like gigot
3. Serve with pepper and lemon on top
source_title: Arte de cozinha

title: Tubaras de Outro Modo (Chitterlings - Second Preparation)
body:
## Ingredients

- lamb chitterlings
- eggs
- pepper
- lemon

## Directions

1. Fry the chitterlings cut into small pieces
2. Coat with eggs
3. Serve with pepper and lemon on top
source_title: Arte de cozinha

title: Tubaras de Outro Modo (Chitterlings - Third Preparation)
body:
## Ingredients

- lamb chitterlings
- pork fat (toucinho)
- aromatics (cheiros)
- egg yolks
- yellow broth
- cinnamon
- lemon juice

## Directions

1. Braise the chitterlings in a small pot cut into slices with pork fat and aromatics
2. Bind with egg yolks and yellow broth
3. Place on slices of bread and serve with cinnamon and lemon juice on top
source_title: Arte de cozinha

title: Tutara de Carneiro (Lamb Chitterlings)
body:
## Ingredients

- lamb chitterlings (tubaras)
- pepper
- lemon

## Directions

1. Fry the chitterlings cut into small pieces
2. Place on a plate with pepper and lemon on top
3. Serve
source_title: Arte de cozinha

title: Ufo das Molejas de Vitella (Uses of Veal Sweetbreads)
author: Lucas Rigaud
body:
## Ingredients

- Veal sweetbreads
- Water

## Directions

1. Soak the sweetbreads for a little time in warm water and clean them well
2. Blanch them in boiling water
3. Cut them into pieces and add them to stews and pies where needed
4. They can also be served roasted after being larded with fine bacon
5. Other times they can be cooked like fricandeau
source_title: Cozinheiro moderno, ou nova arte de cozinha

title: Vacca Estufada à Moda (Braised Beef in the Modern Style)
author: Lucas Rigaud
body:
## Ingredients

- One piece of beef
- Old bacon, cut thick
- Salt
- Pepper
- Spices
- Fine herbs
- Two cloves of garlic
- Half a quartilho of wine
- Bacon slices

## Directions

1. Take a piece of beef and lard it with thick old bacon, seasoned with salt, pepper, spices, fine herbs, two cloves of garlic, and half a quartilho of wine
2. Let it marinate seasoned and prepared in this way for three or four hours
3. Place everything in a pot with slices of bacon underneath and on top
source_title: Cozinheiro moderno, ou nova arte de cozinha

title: Vacca Estufada à Moda (Braised Beef the Modern Way)
author: Lucas Rigaud
body:
## Ingredients

- A piece of beef
- old thick bacon for larding
- salt
- pepper
- spices
- fine herbs
- two cloves of garlic
- half a quartilho of wine
- bacon slices for the bottom and top of the pan

## Directions

1. Take a piece of beef and lard it with old thick bacon, seasoned with salt, pepper, spices, fine herbs, two cloves of garlic, and half a quartilho of wine
2. Season and marinate for three or four hours
3. Place everything in a pot with bacon slices below and above
4. Cook slowly between coals for five or six hours
5. When cooked and with little sauce, serve hot or cold as desired
source_title: Cozinheiro moderno, ou nova arte de cozinha

title: Vinho Doce (Sweet Wine Sauce)
author: Lucas Rigaud
body:
## Ingredients

- one quart of red wine
- sugar in stone
- two cloves
- cinnamon
- a piece of green lemon peel
- a little coriander seed

## Directions

1. Let one quart of red wine and sugar in stone boil in a saucepan
2. Add two cloves, cinnamon, a piece of green lemon peel, and a little coriander seed
3. Let it cook slowly and gently
4. When reduced to two thirds, pass it through a sieve
5. Serve cold in sauce boats for roasted game tongues, hares, rabbits, or any other wild game
source_title: Cozinheiro moderno, ou nova arte de cozinha

title: Vitela de Caravonadá (Veal Caravonade)
body:
## Ingredients

- four arratels of veal from the leg, sliced very thin
- lard, seasoned with salt and pepper
- pork lard or lard for frying
- preservation broth
- all black seasonings
- breadcrumbs
- cinnamon

## Directions

1. After being in preservation for three days, cut four arratels of veal from the leg into very thin slices
2. Lard them with pieces of seasoned lard
3. Fry them in pork lard or lard
4. Once fried, cook them for about an hour with a sauce made from the preservation broth and all black seasonings
5. Remove them from the sauce and brown them on the grill, covered with breadcrumbs and cinnamon
6. Once toasted, send to the table
7. The same is done with kid and cow loin
source_title: Arte de cozinha

title: Voee de Flor de Laranja (Orange Blossom Confection)
author: Lucas Rigaud
body:
## Ingredients

- a pound of orange blossoms
- water
- alum stone in powder
- juice of a lemon
- sugar at point

## Directions

1. Choose and ensure they are very white, a pound of orange blossoms, boil them for a quarter hour in water, remove from heat, add a pinch of alum stone in powder
2. Then place water boiling with the juice of a lemon to boil, and with this boiling, gradually add the orange blossoms in a skimming spoon and allow it to boil again until it becomes tender and almost cooked
3. Pass it afterward to cold water and lemon juice; from there drain it and place it in sugar at point, and take it to heat repeatedly to warm, but do not allow it to boil
4. Fill small pots afterward, allow them to cool, cover them, and serve them like the aforementioned ones
source_title: Cozinheiro moderno, ou nova arte de cozinha

title: Vários Frutas de Conserva em Agua Ardente (Various Preserved Fruits in Brandy)
author: Lucas Rigaud
body:
## Ingredients

- fruit
- sugar at point
- brandy

## Directions

1. Cook the fruits whole and then place them in sugar at point, as in the preserves already mentioned
2. Once boiling, if there are for example a hundred apricots, pour in a large measure of brandy and allow it to boil for an instant with the caution that the fire does not go out; if this should happen, it will be extinguished by placing a wet cloth over it
3. Allow to cool after it is made, place in bottles or flasks, cover with syrup, seal very well, and keep for when necessary
source_title: Cozinheiro moderno, ou nova arte de cozinha

title: Xarope de Avença (Maidenhair Fern Syrup)
author: Lucas Rigaud
body:
## Ingredients

- maidenhair fern leaves
- water
- sugar

## Directions

1. Steep one ounce of maidenhair fern leaves in a quart of boiling water.
2. Let it infuse over gentle heat for twelve hours.
3. Pass through a sieve.
4. Pour this juice into one pound of sugar in the hard crack stage.
5. Put it in a bowl with gentle and equal heat for two or three days.
6. When the sugar is reduced and forms a thread that does not break between the fingers, guard it in bottles after it cools, like the preceding ones.
source_title: Cozinheiro moderno, ou nova arte de cozinha

title: Xarope de Maçãs (Apple Syrup)
author: Lucas Rigaud
body:
## Ingredients

- apples
- water
- sugar

## Directions

1. Cut a dozen apples into thin pieces.
2. Boil them in a little water.
3. When cooked, pour into a strong cloth and squeeze very well.
4. Let the juice settle, then take the clear part.
5. For each quart of it, add one pound of sugar in the hair stage.
6. Let it boil until it takes the consistency of a syrup.
7. Then let it cool and guard as stated.
source_title: Cozinheiro moderno, ou nova arte de cozinha

title: Xarope de Orgeat (Almond Syrup)
author: Lucas Rigaud
body:
## Ingredients

- sweet almonds
- bitter almonds
- melon seeds
- water
- sugar

## Directions

1. Blanch in hot water one pound of sweet almonds, one ounce of bitter almonds, and four ounces of peeled melon seeds.
2. Pound it all very well, adding from time to time a small spoonful of water so that it does not turn to oil.
3. When well pounded and moist, pour into half a pint of hot water.
4. Let it infuse for two or three hours over gentle heat.
5. Force through a cloth with a spoon.
6. Pour what was extracted into two pounds of sugar in the hard crack stage.
7. Without boiling it and mixing it well, pour it into a bowl.
8. Cover it with its lid.
9. Place it over gentle heat with equal warmth, and let it sit for two or three days.
10. When the sugar is reduced to the consistency of maidenhair fern syrup, put it in bottles and guard it as has been said in the preceding ones.
source_title: Cozinheiro moderno, ou nova arte de cozinha

title: Xarope de Papoulas (Poppy Syrup)
author: Lucas Rigaud
body:
## Ingredients

- poppy leaves
- water
- sugar

## Directions

1. Pour half a pound of poppy leaves into a glazed bowl.
2. Pour a quart of boiling water over them.
3. Let them infuse for twenty-four hours over hot ashes.
4. Give it two boils.
5. Squeeze through a cloth.
6. Add to the juice one pound of sugar in the hair stage.
7. Boil it all together until it takes the consistency of a syrup, like the others stated.
8. Guard it in the same manner.
source_title: Cozinheiro moderno, ou nova arte de cozinha

title: Ídens Ordinarias ou Extraordinarias (Ordinary or Extraordinary Wild Birds)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 wild or tame bird
- white wine
- 2 ounces of butter
- 1 quince in quarters
- spices

## Directions

1. While roasting a wild or tame bird, collect the drippings until it is half-roasted
2. Add a splash of white wine to the drippings and place in a cooking pot
3. Braise the whole bird in this with two ounces of butter, a quince in quarters, and all the seasonings
source_title: Arte de cozinha
